title: Environmental Sensor Mission -- Evidence-Based Reasoning (Synthetic Pilot)
description: Synthetic example recognition record for a fully synthetic learner ('Learner A') who completed the Environmental Sensor Mission's data story, proposed improvement, and reflection cycle, reviewed by a real authorized teacher. No real student is represented.
criteria: Collected and used timestamped sensor readings without inventing data
Identified a specific pattern in the data and tied it to concrete values
Proposed an improvement supported by a stated rationale
Distinguished the AI agent's role from the learner's own reasoning in the final reflection

limitations: Recognition does not replace a transcript, grade, license, or formal institutional credential.
Based on a synthetic learner pilot, not a real classroom deployment (see governance/adr-001-synthetic-pilot-evidence-for-v0-1-closure.md).

aiAssistance.disclosure: The Reflection Coach agent (learning/reflection-coach-agent-contract.md) asked clarifying questions and checked which rubric evidence was present. It did not write the reflection, choose the proposed improvement, or invent sensor data.
